summary: Tested SnapshotsDrawer UI on /admin/diary-calendar (frontend only). All P1 flows working end-to-end: open drawer, emit+publish snapshot, async PDF render polling, verification URL display, copy/open verify link, sign form open with role/name/type selectors, revoke snapshot 2-step dialog with min-30-char validation, idempotency notice after emit.
critical_code_review_comments: SnapshotsDrawer.jsx is 1050 lines and could be split into SnapshotCard, SignForm, RevokeDialog sub-files for maintainability (>700 lines guideline).

Period-active idempotency hides Emitir button correctly; but if backend supersedes via re-emit elsewhere, the drawer must refetch. Currently it only refetches on open and after explicit actions — acceptable for now.
test_credentials: Used admin gutenberg@sigesc.com / @Celta2007 (super_admin). Class 'Pré I B (Repro 1124beda)' in 'Escola Demo Portal', period Maio 2026.
seed_data_creation: Created one snapshot SIGESC-DIARY-4XU2-8UZA (id 777d95d7-37ca-4f44-b773-e5b9d2f95877) for class Pré I B period 2026-05-01→2026-05-31 during testing. Status=published, no signatures, not revoked. Safe to leave in DB (institutional audit trail expects retention).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested observations: (1) emit button → POST /api/diary/snapshots + auto POST /publish — confirmed by snapshot appearing with status=published and code SIGESC-DIARY-XXXX-XXXX. (2) Render job polled and reached 'completed' within ~10s, 'Documento institucional pronto.' message displayed and 'Baixar PDF' enabled. (3) verification URL https://autosave-drafts.preview.emergentagent.com/verify/diary/{token} rendered correctly; copy/open buttons present. (4) Sign form opens with role select, fullname prefilled with logged-in user name, type buttons manual/image. Note: for super_admin gutenberg the image type was NOT disabled (likely because /api/users/me/signature-image returned a file). For roles without signature_image the image button is expected disabled — covered by code `disabled={!signatureImage?.file_id}`. (5) Revoke snapshot dialog correctly disables 'Continuar' when rationale <30 chars and enables when ≥30. Did not execute final revoke to avoid polluting test data. (6) Idempotency notice 'Já existe um documento Publicado para este período' is shown after emit and emit button is hidden. (7) Periods of other months on same class would appear in same list because filter is class_id only — confirmed by code review (no period filter in fetchSnapshots).
